scripts.kill: powershell -Command "$process = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if ($process) { Stop-Process -Id $process -Force; Write-Host 'Killed process on port 4000' } else { Write-Host 'No process found on port 4000' }"
